title: too + adj./adv. + to V

formulas.zh: 太……以致無法……（具否定意涵）

formulas.formula: so + adj./adv. + that + S + can't/cannot V
formulas.zh: 該句型的等價改寫形式

explanation: 此句型用於表達某事物的程度太高，導致無法完成某動作，具有否定意涵。結構中 too 後接形容詞或副詞，可選擇性加入 for + 受詞以明確指出受影響的主體。常見於學測中比較難度、能力限制的句子。易混淆點：不可用 to 後接被動語態；for sb. 可省略但 to V 不可省。注意 too 表「太過」而非單純的「很」。

examples.eng: This problem is too difficult for high school students to solve in five minutes.
examples.chi: 這個問題對高中學生來說太難了，無法在五分鐘內解決。

examples.eng: The music was too loud for us to hear each other clearly.
examples.chi: 音樂太大聲了，我們無法清楚地相互交流。

examples.eng: He spoke too quickly for anyone to understand what he said.
examples.chi: 他說話太快了，以至於沒人能聽懂他說的話。

examples.eng: The book is too advanced for beginners to read without a dictionary.
examples.chi: 這本書對初學者來說太深奧了，沒有字典無法閱讀。

extension.tip: 判斷依據：句子中若出現「太過～」導致「無法做某事」的否定意涵，應使用 too...to 句型。注意 too 必須修飾形容詞或副詞，不能直接修飾動詞。易錯：混淆 too + adj. to V（無法）與 enough + adj. to V（足以）的正反意涵。

examples.test: ❌ The box is too heavy to carry it.
examples.result: → ✅ The box is too heavy for me to carry. （省略代詞，避免重複）

examples.test: ❌ The movie is too interesting to watch.
examples.result: → ✅ The movie is so interesting that everyone wants to watch it. （此情境應用 enough 或改寫為 so...that）

examples.test: ❌ He ran too fast to catch him.
examples.result: → ✅ He ran too fast for anyone to catch him. （需加 for + 受詞說明主體）

extension.note: too 帶否定意涵，記住『太過無法』；若是『足以做』應改用 enough 或 so...that 正面表述。

parts: The question on the exam was
for most students to answer correctly.
exercises.sentence: The question on the exam was too difficult for most students to answer correctly.
exercises.translation: 考試上的那道題對大多數學生來說太難了，無法正確回答。

parts: for a child to wear alone.
exercises.sentence: This jacket is too heavy for a child to wear alone.
exercises.translation: 這件夾克對孩子來說太重了，無法獨自穿著。

parts: for the audience to follow her explanation.
exercises.sentence: She spoke too rapidly for the audience to follow her explanation.
exercises.translation: 她講話太快了，聽眾無法跟上她的解釋。

parts: to finish by Friday without additional help.
exercises.sentence: The project is too complicated to finish by Friday without additional help.
exercises.translation: 這個專案太複雜了，沒有額外幫助無法在週五前完成。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的答案完成句子，表達某事物太困難而無法做到
mc_exercises.question_eng: The suitcase is _______ heavy for me to carry upstairs alone.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (too)。此題考 too...to V 句型，表示「太重以至於無法搬動」。A 選項 so 需搭配 that 子句；C 和 D 的 very 和 quite 只表程度，無法表達「太過導致無法完成」的否定意涵。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確選項完成句子，表達年紀太小而無法參與某活動
mc_exercises.question_eng: Children are _______ young _______ understand the movie's plot.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (too / to)。too...to V 結構中，too 後直接接不定詞 to。A 雖也可表達，但題目空格應填 too 與 to；C 的 that 是 so...that 句型用詞；D 搭配不當。此題考核心句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的答案完成句子，表達語速太快導致難以理解
mc_exercises.question_eng: The speaker talked _______ fast _______ the audience to follow his lecture.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (too / for)。此句表達「語速太快使得聽眾無法跟上」，需用 too...for sb. to V 結構。A 是 so...that 句型但表述冗長；B 的 very 無法表達「太過」的否定含義；D 混淆了兩種句型。考點是 for sb. 的用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當答案完成句子，區分 too/so 句型及 for sb. 用法細節
mc_exercises.question_eng: The questions were _______ complicated for the beginners _______ answer them correctly within the time limit.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (too / to)。標準的 too...for sb. to V 句型應為「too complicated for the beginners to answer」。A 的 so...that 結構冗余；C 混淆 too 和 so；D 的 very 無法表達否定含義。此題考 for sb. 後直接接 to V 的省略用法。
